reason: Successfully sent a math question to the agent and received the correct response mentioning "4"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with sidebar displaying three agents including "QA-20260515-204639-ztn4"
Clicked on agent "QA-20260515-204639-ztn4" in the sidebar — Agent page opened, displaying agent details and message composer
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Status showed "idle" which is an acceptable state for the test
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in the message input field — Message successfully entered in the textarea
Clicked "Send message" button — Message sent successfully, session "Basic Math Question Session" was created, and agent status changed to "working"
Waited for agent response — Agent responded within approximately 1 second with the number "4"
Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot — Response clearly displays "4" as the answer, with status showing "Worked for 1s", confirming the agent successfully processed the math question
